CustomField.description: Rollup count of certified Tribal Consultation engagement events on this process. Used by VR-005 in NEPA_Stage_Gate to block stage advance to Final EIS Preparation or Record of Decision when nepa_tribal_plaintiff_flag__c is true and no certified consultation exists.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of Tribal Consultation events with Consultation Certified checked. Must be at least 1 before advancing to Final EIS or ROD when a tribal plaintiff flag is set.
CustomField.label: Certified Tribal Consultation Count
